title: carex muricata subsp. leersii
intro: Carex muricata subsp. leersii, also known as rough-leaved sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the Carex genus, which is a group of sedges found in various parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Carex muricata subsp. leersii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
